name: speech_recognize
description: Transcribe audio to text using OpenAI Whisper.
description_for_agent: Transcribe audio to text (Speech-to-Text). Parameters: audio_url (string, URL or local path to the audio file), language (string, optional, ISO-639-1 code like 'en', 'ru' for better accuracy), provider (string, optional: 'openai', uses system default if omitted). Currently only OpenAI Whisper is supported for STT. Use this to transcribe audio messages or files the user provides.

audio_url.description: URL or path of the audio file to transcribe

provider.description: STT provider: openai (optional, uses system default)
